question: Is the image divided into two vertical columns, with the left column (approx. 60%) wider than the right column (approx. 40%)?
Does the left column feature a radial mind map with a large central circle labeled 'T0'?
Are there exactly 6 main branches radiating from the center in the specified directions (up, upper-right, lower-right, down, lower-left, upper-left)?
Do the main branches connect to 6 rounded rectangle nodes labeled 'A' through 'F'?
Do the nodes A-F form a regular hexagonal layout around the center, exhibiting vertical and horizontal symmetry?
Does each of the 6 main nodes (A-F) extend into exactly 3 secondary branches connecting to small unlabeled dots?
Does each secondary dot further branch into exactly 2 even smaller leaf dots?
Does the right column feature a vertical timeline with exactly 7 milestone dots labeled 'T1' through 'T7' arranged equidistantly?
Does each timeline dot connect via a short horizontal line to a rectangular label box labeled 'P1' through 'P7'?
Is there a bypass fork between T3 and T4 that diverges to a dot labeled 'X1' and returns to the main line at T4?
Is there a table located at the bottom of the right column consisting of exactly 2 rows and 3 columns?
Does the table feature a checkerboard fill pattern with the top-left cell being black?
Are all text labels (T0, A-F, T1-T7, P1-P7, X1) clearly legible and free of spelling errors?
